content.title: MEDIROM Reports Revenue Growth Despite Asset Decline
content.summary: MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies (MRM) has released an update. MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies reported a total revenue increase to ¥3.48 billion for the first half of 2024, compared to ¥3.15 billion in the same period of 2023, driven primarily by growth in their directly-operated salons. However, their total assets decreased from ¥6.85 billion to ¥5.83 billion, resulting in a shareholders’ deficit of ¥364.3 million as of June 30, 2024. content.title: MEDIROM Partners with Elematec to Boost Health Tech
content.summary: MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies (MRM) has released an update. MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies’ subsidiary, MEDIROM MOTHER Labs, has entered a strategic alliance with Elematec Corporation, a member of the Toyota Tsusho group, which includes a significant investment in MOTHER Labs’ Series A funding. This partnership aims to amplify the distribution of MEDIROM’s innovative MOTHER Bracelet, a health-monitoring device that operates without recharging. content.title: MEDIROM Healthcare Secures New Investment Bonds
content.summary: MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies (MRM) has released an update. MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. has entered into a purchase agreement with Triple One Investment Partnership for the issue of 2nd unsecured convertible-type corporate bonds with share options, totaling JPY 300,000,000. The bonds will be issued on October 25, 2024, with payment due by October 11, 2024.
